---
title: "Journals"
toc: true
include-in-header: 
  text: |
    <script src="assets/js/system-init.js"></script>
---

The **Web of Science Core Collection™** is the premier resource on the platform and includes over 21,000 peer-reviewed, high-quality scholarly journals.

It comprises four key indices:

1. **Science Citation Index Expanded™ (SCIE)**: Covers more than 9,200 of the world’s most impactful journals.
2. **Social Sciences Citation Index™ (SSCI)**: Covers over 3,400 of the world’s leading journals of social sciences.
3. **Arts & Humanities Citation Index™ (AHCI)**: Covers over 1,800 journals.
4. **Emerging Sources Citation Index™ (ESCI)**: Covers emerging trends.

This list is specifically compiled for research areas including:

* Rural Development, Labour Livelihood
* Environment, Vegetation, Degradation, LULC Change
* Water, Ground Water, Drought, Flood
* Climate, Extreme Events
* Soil, Topography
* Remote Sensing (SAR Radar, etc.)

## Prioritizing No-Fee Publishing

To support researchers with limited funding, this list **prioritizes journals that offer a "Subscription" or "Hybrid" model**. In this model, **authors do NOT pay publication fees** (Article Processing Charges - APCs).

<div style="text-align: center; margin-top: 2rem;">
  <a href="https://mjl.clarivate.com/manuscript-matcher" class="btn btn-primary" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
    <i class="bi bi-search"></i> Find Journals with Manuscript Matcher
  </a>
</div>

<br>

## Journal Finder Tools

::: {.software-grid}

::: {.resource-card}
<a href="https://wos-journal.info/" class="stretched-link"></a>
<h3>WoS & SCI Journal Search</h3>
Easily search for Web of Science (SCI/SCIE/SSCI) indexed journals, verify their quartiles, and check Impact Factors for quality assurance.
<span class="resource-link-text">Visit Tool <i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i></span>
:::

::: {.resource-card}
<a href="https://listofjournals.com/" class="stretched-link"></a>
<h3>List of Journals</h3>
A comprehensive directory to browse and discover academic journals across various disciplines, indexing services, and publishers.
<span class="resource-link-text">Visit Tool <i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i></span>
:::

::: {.resource-card}
<a href="https://journalsearches.com/" class="stretched-link"></a>
<h3>Journal Searches</h3>
An advanced tool designed to help researchers identify the most suitable journals for their manuscripts based on scope and metrics.
<span class="resource-link-text">Visit Tool <i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i></span>
:::

::: {.resource-card}
<a href="https://phdtalks.org/" class="stretched-link"></a>
<h3>PhD Talks</h3>
A comprehensive portal providing daily updates on academic opportunities, research tools, writing guides, and career advice for PhD candidates.
<span class="resource-link-text">Visit Tool <i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i></span>
:::

:::


:::

<br>

## Publisher Submission Guide: Avoiding Fees

Most top-tier journals are **Hybrid**, meaning they offer both a **Subscription** (Free for authors) and an **Open Access** (Paid) option. To avoid paying Article Processing Charges (APCs), you must select the correct option during submission.

::: {.callout-tip}
### 💡 Key Terminology
*   **Subscription / Traditional**: The reader pays (via university library), so the **author pays nothing**.
*   **Gold Open Access**: The author pays an APC to make the article free for everyone.
*   **Hybrid**: A journal that offers **BOTH** options. You must strictly choose "Subscription" to publish for free.
:::

### How to Select "No-Fee" by Publisher

| Publisher | System Name | Action Required for Free Publishing |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Elsevier** | Editorial Manager | Look for the **"Publishing Options"** step after acceptance. Select **"Subscription"** (often the default is Open Access, be careful). |
| **Springer** | Editorial Manager / SNAPP | During submission, you will be asked about Open Access. Select **"No, I want to publish my article via the traditional subscription model"**. |
| **Wiley** | ScholarOne | In the license signing phase (Author Services), choose the **"OnlineOpen: No"** or **"Standard License"** option. |
| **Taylor & Francis** | ScholarOne | After acceptance, select **"Standard Article"** (Green OA compliant) instead of "Gold Open Access". |
| **IEEE** | ScholarOne | IEEE often has page charges for long papers (e.g., >10 pages). Standard publication is free within page limits; avoid selecting "Open Access". |

<br>

## Prioritized Journal Lists

The following lists are curated for researchers seeking **Web of Science (SCIE/SSCI/AHCI/ESCI)** indexed journals with **No-Fee (Subscription/Hybrid)** publication options.

::: {.callout-note}
**Note:** "Hybrid" journals allow authors to choose between publishing via the subscription model (free for authors) or Open Access (APC applies). Select the **Subscription** option upon submission to avoid fees.
:::

## 🏘️ Rural & Development
**Focus:** Rural Development, Livelihoods, Socio-economic Geography, Regional Studies.

::: {.course-grid}

::: {.course-card}
[<img src="https://placehold.co/600x400/1a5f7a/ffffff?text=Rural+Studies" class="nolightbox">](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/journal-of-rural-studies)
::: {.course-card-body}
### Journal of Rural Studies
Key Q1 SSCI journal focusing on socio-economic and cultural aspects of rural areas.
::: {.card-footer}
[<i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i> SSCI (Q1) | Elsevier](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/journal-of-rural-studies){.social-btn .stretched-link}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.course-card}
[<img src="https://placehold.co/600x400/219150/ffffff?text=World+Development" class="nolightbox">](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/world-development)
::: {.course-card-body}
### World Development
Multidisciplinary journal of development studies with a focus on poverty and equity.
::: {.card-footer}
[<i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i> SSCI (Q1) | Elsevier](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/world-development){.social-btn .stretched-link}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.course-card}
[<img src="https://placehold.co/600x400/d35400/ffffff?text=Land+Use+Policy" class="nolightbox">](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/land-use-policy)
::: {.course-card-body}
### Land Use Policy
Interdisciplinary journal exploring social, economic, political and legal aspects of land use.
::: {.card-footer}
[<i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i> SSCI (Q1) | Elsevier](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/land-use-policy){.social-btn .stretched-link}
:::
:::
:::

:::

## 🌍 Environment & LULC
**Focus:** LULC Change, Degradation, Soil Science, Environmental Management.

::: {.course-grid}

::: {.course-card}
[<img src="https://placehold.co/600x400/27ae60/ffffff?text=Env+Management" class="nolightbox">](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/journal-of-environmental-management)
::: {.course-card-body}
### Journal of Env. Management
Focuses on scientific assessment metrics for management of the environment.
::: {.card-footer}
[<i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i> SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/journal-of-environmental-management){.social-btn .stretched-link}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.course-card}
[<img src="https://placehold.co/600x400/16a085/ffffff?text=Land+Degradation" class="nolightbox">](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/journal/1099145x)
::: {.course-card-body}
### Land Degradation & Dev.
Aims to promote the scientific study of the recognition and monitoring of land degradation.
::: {.card-footer}
[<i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i> SCIE (Q1) | Wiley](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/journal/1099145x){.social-btn .stretched-link}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.course-card}
[<img src="https://placehold.co/600x400/2c3e50/ffffff?text=Catena" class="nolightbox">](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/catena)
::: {.course-card-body}
### Catena
International journal of Soil Science, Hydrology and Geomorphology.
::: {.card-footer}
[<i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i> SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/catena){.social-btn .stretched-link}
:::
:::
:::

:::

## 💧 Water & Hazards
**Focus:** Hydrology, Climate Change, Floods, Droughts, Extreme Events.

::: {.course-grid}

::: {.course-card}
[<img src="https://placehold.co/600x400/2980b9/ffffff?text=Hydrology" class="nolightbox">](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/journal-of-hydrology)
::: {.course-card-body}
### Journal of Hydrology
Publishes original research papers and reviews in all subfields of the hydrological sciences.
::: {.card-footer}
[<i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i> SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/journal-of-hydrology){.social-btn .stretched-link}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.course-card}
[<img src="https://placehold.co/600x400/3498db/ffffff?text=Water+Resources" class="nolightbox">](https://agupubs.onlinelibrary.wiley.com/journal/19447973)
::: {.course-card-body}
### Water Resources Research
Interdisciplinary journal that publishes original contributions in the natural and social sciences.
::: {.card-footer}
[<i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i> SCIE (Q1) | AGU/Wiley](https://agupubs.onlinelibrary.wiley.com/journal/19447973){.social-btn .stretched-link}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.course-card}
[<img src="https://placehold.co/600x400/e67e22/ffffff?text=Hazards" class="nolightbox">](https://www.springer.com/journal/11069)
::: {.course-card-body}
### Natural Hazards
Journal devoted to all aspects of natural hazards including forecasting and risk assessment.
::: {.card-footer}
[<i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i> SCIE (Q1/Q2) | Springer](https://www.springer.com/journal/11069){.social-btn .stretched-link}
:::
:::
:::

:::

## 📡 RS & GIS
**Focus:** Remote Sensing, GIS, Spatial Analysis, Radar/SAR.

::: {.course-grid}

::: {.course-card}
[<img src="https://placehold.co/600x400/34495e/ffffff?text=RS+Environment" class="nolightbox">](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/remote-sensing-of-environment)
::: {.course-card-body}
### Remote Sensing of Env.
The premier journal for the remote sensing community, covering all earth resource applications.
::: {.card-footer}
[<i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i> SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/remote-sensing-of-environment){.social-btn .stretched-link}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.course-card}
[<img src="https://placehold.co/600x400/2c7da0/ffffff?text=ISPRS+Journal" class="nolightbox">](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/isprs-journal-of-photogrammetry-and-remote-sensing)
::: {.course-card-body}
### ISPRS J. Photogramm. RS
Focusing on photogrammetry, remote sensing, and related information sciences.
::: {.card-footer}
[<i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i> SCIE (Q1) | Elsevier](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/isprs-journal-of-photogrammetry-and-remote-sensing){.social-btn .stretched-link}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.course-card}
[<img src="https://placehold.co/600x400/8e44ad/ffffff?text=IEEE+TGRS" class="nolightbox">](https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/xpl/RecentIssue.jsp?punumber=36)
::: {.course-card-body}
### IEEE Trans. Geosci. RS
Theoretical and empirical contributions to science and engineering in remote sensing.
::: {.card-footer}
[<i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i> SCIE (Q1) | IEEE](https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/xpl/RecentIssue.jsp?punumber=36){.social-btn .stretched-link}
:::
:::
:::

:::


<br>

## 🛡️ Submission & Safety Tips

Before submitting your manuscript, ensure you verify the journal's credibility and understand its metrics.

:::{.grid}

:::{.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### 📊 Understanding Metrics
Journals are ranked by **Impact Factor (IF)** within their subject categories (e.g., Geography, Environmental Sciences).

*   **Q1 (Top 25%)**: Highest prestige and visibility. Often hardest to accept.
*   **Q2 (Top 25-50%)**: Excellent quality, balances visibility with slightly higher acceptance rates.
*   **Q3/Q4**: Good entry points for niche topics or early-career research.
:::

:::{.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### 🚩 Avoiding Predatory Journals
Be cautious of **"Clone Journals"** that mimic the names of reputable titles.

1.  **Verify Indexing**: Always check the journal on the official [Master Journal List (MJL)](https://mjl.clarivate.com/).
2.  **Check ISSN**: Ensure the ISSN on the journal website matches the one on MJL.
3.  **Red Flags**: Avoid journals promising "Review in 3 days" or "Guaranteed Publication".

:::

<br>

## 🎯 Journals on Target

List of specific journals targeted for future submissions (Jan 2026).

| Journal | Publisher | Indexing | ISSN | Metrics (IF / SJR / Q) | Link |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :---: |
| **Environmental Sustainability** | Springer Nature | ESCI (WoS), UGC CARE | 2523-8922 | IF: 2.8 | [Visit](https://link.springer.com/journal/42398) |
| **Journal of City Climate Policy and Economy** | Univ. of Toronto Press | Scilit (New Journal) | 2816-7414 | N/A (New) | [Visit](https://jccpe.utpjournals.press/) |
| **J. of Arid Land Resources and Env.** | China Science Pub. | CSCD, Scopus (Check) | 1003-7578 | N/A | [Visit](https://mall.cnki.net/magazine/magadetail/GHZG202401.htm) |
| **J. of Asian Business & Econ. Studies** | Emerald | Scopus (Q1), ESCI, DOAJ | 2516-1598 | IF: 3.6 / SJR: 0.66 | [Visit](https://www.emeraldgrouppublishing.com/journal/jabes) |
| **Swiss J. of Economics and Statistics** | SpringerOpen | Scopus (Q1/Q3), DOAJ | 2235-6282 | IF: 1.6 / SJR: 0.36 | [Visit](https://sjes.springeropen.com/) |
| **Cureus J. of Agriculture & Food Science** | Springer Nature | *Not yet indexed* | N/A | *Fee Waived till June 2026* | [Visit](https://www.cureusjournals.com/journal/agriculture-and-food-science) |
| **Discover Social Science & Health** | SpringerOpen | Scopus, DOAJ | 2731-0469 | IF: 1.3 / SJR: 0.45 | [Visit](https://diser.springeropen.com/) |
| **SERIEs - J. of Spanish Econ. Assoc.** | Springer | Scopus (Q2), SSCI | 1869-4195 | IF: 1.8 / SJR: 0.55 | [Visit](https://link.springer.com/journal/13209) |

::: {.callout-warning}
**Note on Cureus:** This is a new journal under the Cureus/Springer umbrella. It is currently **not indexed** in Web of Science or Scopus. Proceed with caution for academic credit requirements.
:::

:::

### ⏱️ How to Estimate Review Speed?
Most publishers now provide metrics on their journal homepages:
*   **Elsevier**: Look for "Time to First Decision" and "Review Time" on the Journal Insights page.
*   **Springer**: Check the "Journal Updates" or "About" section for speed metrics.
*   **Taylor & Francis**: Often displays "Speed/Acceptance" metrics in the journal banner.
